primary.description: Spiritual Saffron - represents purity, fire, and the divine.

secondary.description: Deep Blue/Slate - represents the infinite, cosmic nature of Shiva.

background.description: Warm Stone/Cream - off-white to provide breathing room and physical texture.

surface.description: Pure white for cards and floating elements.

accent.description: Temple Gold - for subtle highlights, stars, or secondary accents.

text_main.description: High contrast dark slate for maximum readability.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Apply tracking-tight or tracking-tighter for an editorial, monumental feel.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for dense informational sections.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: TETRIS grid for the Homepage marketing sections (asymmetrical, overlapping). CONTROL ROOM grid for Individual Temple pages (dense data, travel info, map).
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Avoid excessive roundness; temple architecture has sharp, definitive lines.

surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-orange-100/50), subtle warm drop shadow on hover (shadow-orange-900/5).
surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism over hero images (bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/20).
surface_strategies.map_container: Deep Blue background (bg-slate-900) with subtle noise texture, map paths in muted gold/saffron, glowing saffron dots for the 12 Jyotirlingas.

components_usage.navigation: Dropdown menu for all 12 Jyotirlingas. Must be built with Shadcn NavigationMenu or DropdownMenu. Desktop visible.
components_usage.search: Shadcn Command dialog for finding temples by name/location.
components_usage.tables_and_data: Shadcn Table for Ritual Timings. Shadcn Tabs for switching between Stay, Food, Travel info on individual pages.

hero_image.description: Dramatic silhouette of Shiva statue against a vibrant sunset sky. Ideal for Homepage Hero.

somnath_temple.description: Beautiful temple framed by intricate architecture. Use for Somnath card/page.

kashi_vishwanath.description: Boats floating in Varanasi, representing Kashi Vishwanath spiritual environment.

ritual_ceremony.description: Hindu priest conducting traditional rituals with incense. Good for generic 'Rituals & Timings' sections.

sadhus_gathering.description: Hindu sadhus in traditional saffron attire. Use for cultural context or mythology section.

mahakaleshwar_temple.description: Ujjain temple architecture, use for Mahakaleshwar.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling, giving weight and a premium feel to the spiritual journey.
animations.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow enhancement on temple cards. Image zoom (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden containers.
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up for temple lists using Framer Motion.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text over saffron has minimum 4.5:1 contrast, otherwise use deep slate text. Text over hero images must use text-shadow or gradient underlays.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testids: All interactive elements (dropdowns, search inputs, temple cards, tabs) MUST have kebab-case data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing homepage bento grids; avoid using Shadcn 'Card' wrappers for these to allow aggressive asymmetry and overlapping.
Use Shadcn components for the interactive utilities (Search Dialog, NavigationMenu, Tabs for Stay/Food/Travel).
Integrate a visual Map section. If an interactive library is heavy, use a custom SVG map of India highlighting the 12 locations with absolute positioned pulsing dots.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' are loaded from Google Fonts in index.html.
Theme the Tailwind config based on the provided colors (override standard slate with the provided warm background and deep blue/saffron palette).
